stocks.impact_theory: Broadcom reported Q1 FY2026 earnings beating estimates with $19.31B revenue (up 29% YoY) driven by AI chips; CEO projected AI revenue >$100B in 2027. Economic implications: Signals sustained AI infrastructure spend boosting semis sector amid tech rally. Market psychology: Relief rally post-earnings beat counters ROI fears, FOMO on AI growth. Historical parallels: Similar to NVDA post-earnings surges in 2023-24. Analogies: Like a rocket booster igniting (AI demand), or dam breaking flooding semis with positivity.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat and strong AI guidance spark positive sentiment; stock up post-earnings. Web searches confirm pops on beat, AI projections; high volume indicates momentum into March 6.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% gains on AI hype continuation; target $360.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if broader tech selloff; potential 5% loss to $310.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation (high PE), tariff impacts on semis, market rotation from tech.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings beat, clear AI catalyst, historical AI stock patterns reliable.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 earnings beat on AI/data center orders (revenue +33% to $1.43B), but FY2026 guidance midpoint $6.1B disappointed vs expectations. Implications: Highlights AI networking demand but profitability concerns. Psychology: Sell-the-news after run-up, profit-taking. Parallels: Optics peers like ACLS post-beats drops. Analogies: Like eating dessert first (beat) then bitter coffee (guidance), or peak bloom wilting.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Stock down 16% despite beat due to weak FY guide; news emphasizes disappointment after YTD gains.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long dip for rebound to $320 if AI narrative holds; 10% upside.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 20% further drop to $230 on guidance fears.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Unexpected AI order acceleration, broader market recovery.

stocks.justification: Clear guidance miss drives sentiment, but AI tailwinds could reverse.

stocks.impact_theory: Reports of OpenAI ad partnership talks + CEO $148M stock buy spark rally (up 20-30%). Implications: Validates adtech in AI era, potential revenue boost. Psychology: Oversold bounce + insider confidence. Parallels: Adtech surges on big tech deals (e.g., GOOG partnerships). Analogies: Lifeline to drowning sailor (OpenAI), or phoenix rising from ad slump ashes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Explosive volume, multiple reports on OpenAI + insider buy; huge sentiment shift from YTD losses.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Deal not materializing, ad market slowdown.

stocks.justification: Speculative catalyst strong but unconfirmed; insider buy adds credibility.

stocks.impact_theory: Q4 record revenue (+10%) on Aerie growth, but margins compressed by tariffs. Implications: Consumer resilience vs cost pressures. Psychology: Mixed earnings reaction, tariff fears weigh. Parallels: Retailers hit by trade wars 2018-19. Analogies: Strong harvest but storm clouds (tariffs), or full sails meeting headwinds.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Beat but tariff headwinds dominate headlines; consumer cyclical sensitivity.

stocks.impact_theory: Q4 earnings/revenue beat, upbeat outlook but flags price hikes on tariffs; stock drops. Implications: Turnaround progress vs inflation. Psychology: Profit-taking despite positives. Parallels: Apparel peers post-earnings fades. Analogies: Victory lap trip-up, or feast followed by fast.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Beat not enough vs high expectations; tariff mentions sour sentiment.

stocks.justification: Positive ops overshadowed by macros; moderate conviction.
